claim_results.claim: And Paul says he did it because he didn't understand what he was doing.
Redemption requires before and after.
Satan couldn't see this because the eraser hadn't fired yet.
The framework doesn't choose between them — it shows they're four projections of a single event onto different measurement bases.
The Cross does all four simultaneously because it operates from the eternal frame, where all four aspects are co-present .

The Lamb is slain "from the foundation of the world" ( Rev 13:8 ) — not because God looked forward in time and saw it would be needed, but because in the eternal frame there is no "before" and "after." The Cross exists as a structural feature of reality, not as a response to an event.
He sees the Cross and reads it as defeat because he reads sequences as linear: death follows, therefore death wins.

"It is finished" doesn't mean "the task is done." It means "this was always-already accomplished." The Spirit actualizes the Atonement at every moment — backward to Adam, forward to the end of the age — because the Spirit operates from the eternal frame, not the temporal one.
Every Strategy of Evil Requires Time This is the prediction that should make you stop and think.
If time is the battlefield and the Cross is the weapon hidden in time, then every strategy the adversary uses should exhibit temporal structure .
"Remember what you did?" It requires a "before" that can be weaponized in the "now." Without sequence, there is no "before" to remember.
Delayed Obedience "Later" assumes "later" exists "I'll get serious about God later." The serpent's best evidence God lied was the temporal delay between eating and dying.
The brain scans confirm what the equation predicts.
Not because someone is bringing you good advice from 2,000 years ago.
Because the event itself is operating from the eternal frame, projected into this exact moment by the Spirit who is not bound by your timeline.
The delayed-choice quantum eraser proves that future events can determine past behavior.
The Three Pathways shows what "now" looks like in your body: the moment you stop performing and start receiving, the vmPFC activates, oxytocin rises, the parasympathetic system engages.
The Decoherence Curve shows the macro version — the floor that entropy can't breach, the $G > 0$ that holds everything up, measured across 2,400 years of data.
Four Atonement Theories ↔ Four Equation Terms Penal Substitution = $S \cdot C$ paid by infinite $G$.
The full axiom map is in the GitHub tab.
Every model is projection of higher-dimensional reality onto lower-dimensional surface we can comprehend.
We do not claim to have captured God in equations.
We claim that when we look at His creation honestly — with the tools of physics and the revelation of Scripture — the same structure appears in both.
Where our model limits what God can be, the limitation is ours, not His.
Any claim that turns a structural resemblance into a proven mechanism belongs here until the math, experiment, or textual chain can carry the weight.
Possible overstatement: language that sounds final should be read as a working model unless the article explicitly proves it.

Paul claims (1 Cor 2:7–8) that the rulers of this age would not have crucified the Lord of glory had they known what they were doing — meaning Satan executed the Cross because he could not see what it was.
Every strategy of evil (temptation, despair, accusation, addiction) requires the temporal axis; remove dt and they all collapse.
The Plain-English Version Paul says Satan helped get Jesus killed because he didn't realize the killing was the plan.

But the Resurrection — coming a few days later — reached backward through time and changed the meaning of the Cross from "they killed him" to "he paid for everyone." Satan didn't see it coming because he doesn't read time backward.
Satan sees it as victory because he's reading the sequence linearly: Jesus dies, the plan ends.
Satan executed his own destruction because he couldn't see backward through time the way God can.
The Cross-as-eraser claim is structural isomorphism, not derivation, but a collapse of the physical analogue weakens the rhetorical bridge.
The framework's unification claim depends on them being co-present aspects, not competing models.
It does not claim Satan is omniscient-minus-temporal-perception.
It does not claim the delayed-choice quantum eraser experiment proves the Cross-Resurrection mechanism.
It does not claim humans should be able to perceive the eternal frame directly.

The strong claim is structural isomorphism between two domains where retrocausal-meaning is operative; the weak claim is that this isomorphism organizes diverse atonement theology into a unified picture.
Every equation that appears in the paper, collected here as a reference index.
Master Equation (Coherence Field) $$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt$$ χ = total coherence.
Plain English: The framework's equation for total system state.
The Cross does all four because it operates from the eternal frame where all four are co-present.
The mathematics of the eraser is standard quantum mechanics — the framework's claim is structural isomorphism, not derivation.
The Cross-as-eraser claim is structural isomorphism with this experiment.
Christus Victor — Atonement-as-victory model The Cross as the weapon that destroyed the enemy's hold on humanity.
Penal Substitution — Atonement-as-debt-absorption model Christ bore the penalty for sin.
Maps directly to Sign Conservation Axiom (A8.2).
Recapitulation — Atonement-as-perfect-template model Christ re-lived the human story and got it right.
Moral Influence — Atonement-as-heart-transformation model Christ's sacrifice transforms the human heart.
The hidden-wisdom claim is that these spiritual rulers were temporally blind.

Logos Field ($\chi$) The pervasive substrate of coherent reality — the framework's $\chi$ field; the Master-Equation field whose value is total system coherence. (Earlier drafts denoted this with $\Lambda$; that symbol is now reserved for the cosmological constant.) Field ≠ coupling : this entry locks the substrate sense.
Entropy / Sin ($S$) The decay parameter in the coherence equation.
Framework note: Entropy (physical frame) and Sin (theological frame) name the same dynamical quantity at the master-equation level.
Full axiom files are in the repo's 00_AXIOMS directory.
